LanguageData.RNTurret_SentryNLAR.label: sentry shotgun turret
LanguageData.RNTurret_SentryNLAR.description: A versatile turret capable of firing a variety of different munitions, including buckshot, EMP slugs, and non-lethal beanbag projectiles, though the bulky shells mean the ammo capacity is somewhat limited. Its dumb AI brain can't be directly controlled, so beware of friendly fire.
LanguageData.RNGun_SentryNLAR.label: sentry shotgun
LanguageData.RNArtillery_SSMTurret.verbs.0.label: ㅤ
